allow: Bash(python -c "import fitz; doc = fitz.open\(r''C:\\Lulu\\Practice\\Product-Launch\\context\\style-references\\EnGenius BrandGuide_new-ol.pdf''\); print\(f''Total pages: {doc.page_count}''\); [print\(f''\\n--- Page {i+1} ---\\n'' + doc[i].get_text\(\)[:800]\) for i in range\(min\(doc.page_count, 20\)\) if doc[i].get_text\(\).strip\(\)]")

Bash(node -e "const { spawn } = require\(''child_process''\); const p = spawn\(''npm.cmd'', [''--version'']\); p.stdout.on\(''data'', d => console.log\(d.toString\(\)\)\); p.on\(''error'', e => console.log\(''ERROR:'', e.message\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const { spawn } = require\(''child_process''\); const p = spawn\(''npm'', [''--version''], {shell: true}\); p.stdout.on\(''data'', d => console.log\(d.toString\(\).trim\(\)\)\); p.on\(''error'', e => console.log\(''ERROR:'', e.message\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const npmPath = require\(''path''\).join\(process.execPath, ''..'', ''node_modules'', ''npm'', ''bin'', ''npm-cli.js''\); console.log\(npmPath\); require\(''fs''\).existsSync\(npmPath\) ? console.log\(''EXISTS''\) : console.log\(''NOT FOUND''\)")
